45.reason: [Error: When i = cnt-1, p[i+1] accesses out-of-bounds memory, causing undefined behavior. The loop should go to cnt-1.]

20.reason: [k is used uninitialized; when the first character is alphabetic, k is used in p[cnt].s[k++] without being initialized to 0]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  [k is uninitialized; using it in p[cnt].s[k++] leads to undefined behavior]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  k is uninitialized, leading to undefined behavior when used as an array index.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  k is not initialized. If the file starts with a letter, k will contain a garbage value, leading to undefined behavior when used as an array index. It should be initialized to 0.

26.reason: Missing null terminator for the string before incrementing cnt, causing strlen and strcmp to read out of bounds.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  [cnt is incremented only at non-letters; if the file ends with a letter, the last word is never counted]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Missing null terminator for the string before incrementing cnt, causing strlen and strcmp to read out of bounds.

30.reason: Strings are not null-terminated after reading characters. Although the global array is zero-initialized, relying on this is unsafe. A '\0' should be explicitly appended to ensure correct behavior for strlen and strcmp.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  [k may be uninitialized on first letter; also no null-terminator placed after the word]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Strings are not null-terminated after reading characters. Although the global array is zero-initialized, relying on this is unsafe. A '\0' should be explicitly appended to ensure correct behavior for strlen and strcmp.
